head: Sko
question: sing·a
Anga ia film ko nia mija antio.
why are they late for the meeting?: Bisong maina meeting ona ru·ute rebaa?
which indian state has the largest popul: India ni badiya adoko mande bangbata?
can you give me your pen?: Naa nang pen ko ona mangenma?
name: bimung
title: Garo Language Master Dictionary
_description: Words with multiple meanings depending on context
this house color is brown: Ia nok ni rong gitchakmrang ong.a
i need to sleep early tonight: Ang.a da.al atamo seng.gnang tusina nang.a
creator: Ba··gipa Bi·rom·bi
speaker: a·gan·gipa
how do you say this in garo?: Ia Achik ku·siko mai ine agana?
